title: CompositeGeometry
description: CompositeGeometry: A collection of multiple sets of Geometry of any or mixed type. Integrity, continuity and closure is not guaranteed. Discontinuous and/or mixed type definitions are possible, with no restrictions placed on how geometry can be combined.

Elements.description: A list of assorted geometry, which together define the composite shape.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
